title: Contract Project Manager – Powertrain & EV Systems
description_raw:
Morson Talent are sourcing a Contract Project Manager with powertrain or EV systems experience for one of the UK’s leading automotive OEMs, based at their technical centre in Coventry.

This role sits within the EV Mechanical Integration team and will focus on coordinating delivery of thermal management system modules (battery cooling plate assemblies, e-motor cooling circuits, cabin HVAC) from supplier selection through to SOP (Start of Production).

What you’ll be doing:
- Manage the mechanical thermal management programme from prototype tooling to production validation (PV) sign-off
- Facilitate DFMEA and DVP&R review sessions with commodity engineers
- Track PPAP (Production Part Approval Process) milestones against programme gateway dates
- Resolve supplier tooling and dimensional concerns through 8D / APQP corrective-action process
- Interface daily with vehicle chief engineer and body/chassis cross-functional teams

What we need:
- Mechanical engineering degree (BEng/MEng)
- 5+ years’ OEM or Tier-1 programme management — ideally on powertrain or thermal sub-systems
- Good working knowledge of APQP, PPAP, DFMEA and DVP&R
- AIAG/VDA FMEA methodology experience a strong plus
- Prince2 or PMP qualified

Rate: £580 per day outside IR35
Contract length: 6 months with a review at month 3
Start: 20 July 2026
Location: Coventry technical centre — on-site daily
